system.description: This skill represents a character's ability to carry out all types of jumps, whether for height or distance. Assuming he has taken a running start to gain momentum, a successful Jump roll allows a character to make a vertical jump equal to his height or a horizontal jump equal to twice his height. If making a jump without a running start, the distance traveled is reduced by half. On a critical success the GD may increase the distance jumped a reasonable amount. A Jump roll also allows a character to carry out simple acrobatics, including turning in the air to land safely from a fall, as explained in the section about health and wounds (page 106).
